_meta.description: Documented wetlands and vleis in greater Harare where residential construction is restricted or a documented demolition risk. Boundaries are INDICATIVE circles compiled from public documentation (Ramsar listings, EMA statements, Harare wetland survey reporting) - NOT survey-grade. Every hit tells the user to verify with the Environmental Management Agency (EMA).
_meta.disclaimer: A pin outside these circles does NOT mean the land is not a wetland. Harare has over 20 mapped wetland systems; this seed list covers the most documented ones and grows with use.

wetlands.name: Monavale Vlei
wetlands.source: Ramsar site listing; COSMO / BirdLife Zimbabwe documentation

wetlands.name: Marlborough Vlei
wetlands.source: Harare wetlands survey; public EMA reporting

wetlands.name: Borrowdale Vlei
wetlands.source: Harare wetlands survey; public reporting on construction disputes

wetlands.name: Belvedere North Vlei
wetlands.source: Harare wetlands survey; public EMA reporting

wetlands.name: Budiriro / Marimba headwaters
wetlands.designation: Wetland area with documented demolitions of stands sold on it
wetlands.source: Public reporting on Budiriro wetland stands and demolitions

wetlands.name: Retreat / Manyame floodplain
wetlands.designation: Floodplain / wetland with documented illegal stand sales
wetlands.source: Public reporting on Retreat demolitions, March 2025

wetlands.name: Hopley / Mukuvisi headwaters
wetlands.designation: Wetland-adjacent settlement with documented illegal sales
wetlands.source: ZACC statements; public reporting on Hopley

wetlands.name: Epworth wetlands
wetlands.designation: Documented wetland system under settlement pressure
wetlands.source: Public EMA reporting on Epworth wetlands
